CrediTrack 0.3.5 production release
Infinity Lines of Code (Pvt) Ltd

Install or update creditrack-core-0.3.5.zip first, then creditrack-portal-0.3.5.zip.
Take a host-level database and wp-content backup before updating.
After installation, save WordPress permalinks and complete the production smoke checks.

See ../docs/deployment.md and ../docs/online-e2e-checklist.md in the source repository.
